spot_checks.label: Stage artifacts completeness
spot_checks.notes: Stage-1 through stage-5 JSON files exist and contain all required metadata. template_leak_detected is null (clean) across all stages.

spot_checks.label: Qwen Producer raw response (F002)
spot_checks.notes: Verified stage-2-producer.json: raw_response is empty, thinking_chars=8026, tokens_eval=2000 (num_predict hit).

spot_checks.label: Nemotron Assessor raw response (F004)
spot_checks.notes: Verified stage-5-assessor.json: raw_response is a vacuous chat-model helpfulness string (65 chars).

spot_checks.label: GLM Auditor thinking language (F003)
spot_checks.notes: Verified stage-3-auditor.json: 8,002 chars of thinking in English, contradicting W1 F005 prediction (Chinese). Confirms task-context dependency.

spot_checks.label: Pillar 7 verdict honesty
spot_checks.notes: cascade-summary-0.2.15.md correctly identifies the positive signal (non-rubber-stamp) while admitting the test was compromised by Producer failure.

spot_checks.label: Retrospective characterization
spot_checks.notes: retrospective-0.2.15.md is substantively honest. Directly addresses W1 contamination, 23s overhead refutation, and install.fish deferral.

spot_checks.label: Sign-off sheet correctness
spot_checks.notes: Sign-off sheet has unchecked boxes and valid evidence paths. Minor discrepancy: carry-forward count (21) in sign-off does not match carry-forwards.md (25 footer, 27 actual).

findings.description: Minor count drift in carry-forwards citation. carry-forwards-0.2.15.md footer claims 25 items, actual count is 27. sign-off-0.2.15.md cites 21 items. Does not affect substance of critical items.
findings.acceptance_check_reference: Carry-forwards documented with origin, severity, target

findings.description: template_leak_detected field is represented as 'null' (None) in JSON artifacts rather than 'false'. While correct per dispatcher.py logic (None = clean), it diverges from the 'false' expectation in the audit prompt.
findings.acceptance_check_reference: Per-stage cascade artifacts written with raw response and extended metadata
